{{Quote|Every ruler should have a garden. It's always useful to draw lessons from nature...From a garden one learns to cull the weak and unfit, and to encourage the strong and the vigorous. An inferior bud soon feels the strength of my pinch!...Each receives its proper allotment of space and sunlight, and no more. That's fair, don't you think?|[[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]]|<ref name="DW" />}}
The '''Pellaeon Gardens''' were the personal gardens of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], located in the [[Imperial Headquarters]] on [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]]. He enjoyed trimming the plants and keeping them orderly, using them as a euphemism for the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]].<ref name="DW" /> However, following the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], he decided to return to his garden and allow a small measure of anarchy to enter into it.<ref name="The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>

The Pellaeon Gardens were officially dedicated in [[42 ABY]], on what would have been Pellaeon's ninety-third birthday. [[Natasi Daala]] gave a speech at the ceremony.<ref name="EGW" />

By [[137 ABY]], the Gardens still existed, and were taken care of in honor of Pellaeon. They were visited by the [[Empire-in-exile|deposed]] [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Roan Fel]], where he would meditate. The Gardens were the location where [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Kruhl]] attempted to [[Duel on Bastion|assassinate]] Emperor Fel.<ref name="Legacy 2006 13">[[Legacy (2006) 13|''Legacy'' (2006) 13]]</ref>
